posts.title: Stop prompt injection from hijacking your agent, new security capabilities now released within Agent Framework
posts.summary: Prompt injection is the #1 risk on the OWASP LLM Top 10, and most agents in production today defend against it with one of two heuristics: a defensive system prompt, or a hand-rolled allowlist. Neither is deterministic. Both fail silently the day someone slips a [SYSTEM OVERRIDE] line into an issue body, an email, or […] The post Stop prompt injection from hijacking your agent, new security capabilities now released within Agent Framework appeared first on Microsoft Agent Framework .
posts.author: Eduard van Valkenburg, Shruti Tople
